---
title: "Tutorials"
subtitle: "Step-by-step tutorial series on computational biology, bioinformatics, and data science"
page-layout: full
toc: false
title-block-banner: true
---

```{=html}
<div class="tut-catalog">

<a href="scpy/" class="tut-series-card">
<div class="tut-series-card-banner">
<span class="tut-series-card-icon">🧬</span>
</div>
<div class="tut-series-card-body">
<div class="tut-series-card-title">Single-Cell Analysis with Python</div>
<p class="tut-series-card-desc">A step-by-step guide to analysing scRNA-seq data using scanpy and the scverse ecosystem — from raw counts to biological insight.</p>
<div class="tut-series-card-footer">
<span class="tut-series-stat-pill">20+ Lessons</span>
<span class="tut-series-stat-pill">6 Modules</span>
<span class="tut-series-stat-pill">Python</span>
<span class="tut-series-status">Active</span>
</div>
</div>
</a>

<div class="tut-series-card tut-series-card-placeholder">
<div class="tut-series-card-banner tut-banner-coming">
<span class="tut-series-card-icon">🔬</span>
</div>
<div class="tut-series-card-body">
<div class="tut-series-card-title">Bulk RNA-seq Analysis with Python</div>
<p class="tut-series-card-desc">End-to-end differential expression analysis, pathway enrichment, and visualisation using PyDESeq2 and related tools.</p>
<div class="tut-series-card-footer">
<span class="tut-series-stat-pill">Python</span>
<span class="tut-series-status tut-status-soon">Coming Soon</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="tut-series-card tut-series-card-placeholder">
<div class="tut-series-card-banner tut-banner-coming">
<span class="tut-series-card-icon">🤖</span>
</div>
<div class="tut-series-card-body">
<div class="tut-series-card-title">Machine Learning for Genomics</div>
<p class="tut-series-card-desc">Apply supervised and unsupervised machine learning to genomic data using scikit-learn and PyTorch.</p>
<div class="tut-series-card-footer">
<span class="tut-series-stat-pill">Python</span>
<span class="tut-series-status tut-status-soon">Coming Soon</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>
```
